hero.headline: Never Worry About Your Pool Ever Again
hero.subheadline: JOMO Pool Service handles every detail so you can experience the Joy of Missing Out on pool stress. Dual-certified technicians, LSI-balanced water at every visit, and a flat monthly fee that covers everything. You just swim.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pool Care Built by Pool Owners<br class="hidden md:block"> Who Demanded Better
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to equipment repair, every JOMO service is backed by dual-certified technicians and industry-leading water chemistry technology.

cards.title: SparklingJOMO Plus — Weekly
cards.description: Premium weekly service including full cleaning, equipment inspection, and LSI-balanced water chemistry. The ultimate hands-off pool ownership experience.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, automation systems, and salt cells. Most repairs completed same-visit by certified technicians.

cards.title: SparklingJOMO — Bi-Weekly
cards.description: Comprehensive bi-weekly pool cleaning with skimming, brushing, basket emptying, water balancing, and filter and salt cell cleaning included.

cards.title: AquaJOMO — Water Chemistry
cards.description: Professional water chemistry testing and balancing to keep your pool water perfectly safe, crystal clear, and balanced to the LSI at every visit.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Heater Services
cards.description: Professional repair and installation of pool and spa heaters to extend your swimming season and maximize comfort year-round in Jacksonville.

cards.title: SaltyJOMO — Salt Conversion
cards.description: Complete salt system conversion and ongoing maintenance for pool owners ready to switch to the softer, lower-maintenance saltwater experience.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to the Joy of Missing Out

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Request a free quote and share your pool details. We respond within 24 hours with honest, transparent pricing — no pressure, no gimmicks.

steps.title: We Show Up Every Single Week
steps.description: Our dual-certified technicians arrive on schedule with industry-leading technology, balancing your water to the LSI and handling every detail.

steps.title: You Just Swim
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and perfectly balanced week after week. That is the JOMO promise — the joy of never worrying about your pool again.

about.label: Why Jacksonville Trusts JOMO
about.headline: Built by Frustrated Pool Owners Who Demanded Better
about.description: In 2020, Mark Slater and John Lewis — two Jacksonville pool owners tired of missed visits, poor communication, and inconsistent service — decided to build the company they wished existed. Partnering with Chris Wiedegreen, they created JOMO Pool Service on the principles of reliability, transparency, and showing up every single week like clockwork. Every technician is dual-certified, earns above industry average, and balances your water to the Langelier Saturation Index at every visit using industry-leading technology.

features.title: Dual-Certified Technicians
features.description: Every JOMO technician holds both CPO and FPPS certifications and completes extensive hands-on training before servicing your pool.

features.title: Flat Monthly Fee — Everything Included
features.description: One predictable monthly price covers all chemicals, equipment checks, and service visits. No surprise charges, no nickel-and-diming.

features.title: LSI-Balanced at Every Visit
features.description: We use industry-leading technology to balance your water to the Langelier Saturation Index every single time — protecting your pool surface and equipment.

pricing.headline: Flat Monthly Pricing. Everything Included.
pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes all chemicals, equipment checks, and our JOMO guarantee. Pick the service level that fits your pool.

guarantee.headline: Our "JOMO Perfect Pool" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool is not crystal clear and perfectly balanced after any service visit, we will come back and make it right at no extra charge. No excuses, no runaround — just the reliable service that earned us 601 five-star reviews. That is the JOMO standard.

faqs.question: How quickly can JOMO start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. We will assess your pool's current condition and have you on a regular weekly schedule fast. Call us at 904-222-0809 and we will get you started.

faqs.question: What does the flat monthly fee include?
faqs.answer: Everything. All chemicals, water testing, balancing to the LSI, skimming, brushing, basket emptying, filter cleaning, salt cell cleaning, and equipment inspections. There are no surprise add-on charges with JOMO.

faqs.question: What certifications do your technicians hold?
faqs.answer: Every JOMO technician is dual-certified, holding both the Certified Pool Operator (CPO) and Florida Public Pool Specialist (FPPS) credentials. They also complete extensive in-house training before servicing any pool.

faqs.question: What is LSI and why does it matter?
faqs.answer: The Langelier Saturation Index measures whether your water is balanced, corrosive, or scale-forming. Balancing to the LSI at every visit protects your pool surface, equipment, and plumbing — saving you thousands in long-term repairs. Most companies skip this step. JOMO never does.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we take care of everything while you are away. You will receive a detailed service report after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

testimonials.name: Travis's Client
testimonials.text: Travis comes to service our pool every week and does a great job. He is always courteous and thorough, and takes time to answer any questions we have. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Tony's Client
testimonials.text: Tony has been doing a great job keeping our pool looking great. He is always friendly with us and our dogs, and always makes sure the gates are closed when he leaves.

testimonials.name: Long-Time Customer
testimonials.text: JOMO is a 1st class operation from the top down. They go above and beyond and are a breath of fresh air when it comes to pool maintenance. Always excellent, reliable, detail oriented, responsive, trustworthy, and do quality work.
